meta.negative_prompt: realistic, photographic, 3D render, text, watermark, complex background, detailed shading, gradient background, cute, kawaii, chibi, big eyes

alt_poses.uno: grumpy cat loaf with half-closed judgmental eyes and a flat unimpressed expression
alt_poses.duo: lazy cat flopped on its side like it just gave up on life, one paw dangling
alt_poses.trio: smug cat doing an exaggerated slow walk, nose in the air, total diva energy
alt_poses.corner: suspicious cat peeking around a corner, one eye narrowed, plotting something
alt_poses.straight: cat mid-zoomie, legs blurred with speed, completely unhinged horizontal sprint
alt_poses.L: cat sitting upright but with legs awkwardly splayed to one side like it forgot how to sit
alt_poses.J: startled cat that just knocked something off a table, legs going the wrong direction
alt_poses.Z: cat tangled in its own body mid-grooming, twisted into an absurd pretzel
alt_poses.S: sneaky cat slinking away from a crime scene, body curved guiltily
alt_poses.T: dramatic cat lying on its back demanding belly rubs with all limbs out, total drama queen
alt_poses.chonk: absolute unit of a cat, impossibly round, smug about its size, no regrets
alt_poses.cross: startled cat with all four legs and tail puffed out in surprise, full starfish panic
alt_poses.chonker: thicc cat that got stuck trying to fit somewhere too small, belly hanging out
alt_poses.chonkest: cat melted into a puddle, boneless blob taking up maximum space, zero dignity
